nodes.name: base.json
nodes.summary: Base shared TypeScript compiler configuration for the monorepo, enabling strict mode, NodeNext module resolution, declaration output, and safety flags like noUncheckedIndexedAccess; all preset tsconfigs extend it.
nodes.languageNotes: Targets ES2022 with NodeNext module/resolution and isolatedModules; serves as the single source of strict compiler defaults inherited by every package.

nodes.name: nextjs.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript preset for Next.js applications that extends base.json, switching to ESNext/Bundler resolution, enabling the Next plugin, JSX preserve mode, allowJs, and noEmit for the framework build.

nodes.name: react-library.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript preset for React library packages that extends base.json and sets JSX to the react-jsx runtime transform.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for the private @repo/typescript-config workspace package that ships the shared tsconfig presets to the rest of the monorepo.
